data.description:
Split src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py (907 LOC, over the 800 soft cap) by extracting the code-review post-verdict finalization cluster into a new strict-leaf module src/rebar/llm/code_review/finalize.py (the code_review/ subpackage already exists; no new __init__.py). This is exactly the seam the docs/architecture.md offenders row for gate_dispatch names as its 'Next seam' — that remedy row is current (not stale) and is deleted by this ticket.

Move (locate by NAME): _resolve_or_create_session_artifact, _link_session_artifact, STEP_ASSEMBLE_DIFF, _HIGH_PRIORITY_FLOOR, _count_diff_lines, _attach_code_review_metrics, and factor the success-branch body of _run_code_review_gate into a new finalize_code_review_verdict(...) in the leaf — leaving _run_code_review_gate a thin sequencer that lazily imports finalize (matching the file's all-lazy cross-module import style). The leaf is a STRICT LEAF: it re-declares the plan-review-shared step-id literals (_STEP_VERIFY/_STEP_DECIDE/_LLM_STEP_KINDS) as small local constants with a mirror comment, avoiding a back-import. gate_dispatch re-exports _attach_code_review_metrics (# noqa: F401) — load-bearing: tests/unit/test_code_review_fp_ledger.py calls gate_dispatch._attach_code_review_metrics at 7 sites.

This is a pure/mechanical relocation — no signature or logic changes; the exact ordering and best-effort try/except guards in the moved success block are preserved (session tests assert an artifact/emit failure never fails the review). E5 testing-plan is not-applicable — the existing test suites are the oracle.

Acceptance criteria (observable, in-session-verifiable):
- NEW src/rebar/llm/code_review/finalize.py exists and is in [100,800] LOC (wc -l).
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py is <=800 LOC (wc -l).
- gate_dispatch.py removed from .github/module-size-allowlist.txt AND .github/module-size-ceilings.txt, and its remedy row deleted from docs/architecture.md offenders table.
- _attach_code_review_metrics is re-exported from gate_dispatch (back-compat; gate_dispatch._attach_code_review_metrics still resolves).
- tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py passes (allowlist == computed over-cap set == ceilings keys).
- tests/unit/test_code_review_fp_ledger.py, test_code_review_gate_session.py, test_code_review_ws4.py, test_gate_engine_cutover.py all pass.
- make lint reports All checks passed!
data.title: Graduate gate_dispatch.py off module-size gate: extract code-review finalize.py
